Update Center

Rules & paddle legality

Official rules, paddle approval, and ban-related updates that can affect tournament play.

All updatesNewsRules & paddle legalityPlayer news & trends
Rules & paddle legalityJun 19, 2026

UPA-A/PPA pro rulebook source

For pro-tour rules affecting PPA Tour and Major League Pickleball style competition, use the UPA-A rulebook page as an official reference and check the exact clause before summarizing.

UPA-APPA rulesMLP rules

Check before acting: Verify the clause number and the event context before acting.

Verify at source: UPA-A Official Rulebook
Rules & paddle legalityJun 19, 2026

Approved paddle legality source

The USA Pickleball approved paddle list is the priority source for tournament legality checks. Approval, decertification, and model-name details should be verified at the original equipment list.

paddle approvalrulesequipment

Check before acting: Search the exact paddle model and approval status before tournament play.

Verify at source: USA Pickleball Approved Paddle List

Primary sources to verify

Reference source

USA Pickleball official rules

Checks: official rulebook changes · rule interpretations · rule PDFs

Source
Reference source

USA Pickleball approved paddle list

Checks: approved paddle list · decertified paddles · newly added paddles · tournament legality

Source
Reference source

UPA-A official rulebook

Checks: pro tour rules · PPA/MLP rule changes · equipment standards · scoring rules

Source
